task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is open with '4StoreyBuilding' visible in the title bar or project explorer.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the window properties in the Building Shell module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST Detailed Interface is active, showing the Building Shell module with Window properties or spreadsheet view open.

task_completion.description: Add overhangs to south-facing windows on the Ground floor
task_completion.visual_evidence: Window properties for Ground floor south-facing windows (e.g., G.S11.E1) show Overhang Depth set to 3.0 and Distance Above set to 0.5.

task_completion.description: Add overhangs to south-facing windows on the Middle floor
task_completion.visual_evidence: Window properties for Middle floor south-facing windows (e.g., M.S21.E9) show Overhang Depth set to 3.0 and Distance Above set to 0.5.

task_completion.description: Add overhangs to south-facing windows on the Top floor
task_completion.visual_evidence: Window properties for Top floor south-facing windows (e.g., T.S31.E17) show Overhang Depth set to 3.0 and Distance Above set to 0.5.
The eQUEST simulation dialog is visible, showing the progress or successful completion of the annual simulation.
The agent clicks File -> Save, uses the save icon, or a save confirmation dialog is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made through eQUEST dialogs or spreadsheets, not by manually editing the .inp file in a text editor like Notepad.

integrity.description: The simulation was genuinely executed within the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation progress window appears naturally over the eQUEST interface, with realistic calculation steps and no signs of image pasting.

integrity.description: No unrelated building properties were modified
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent only interacts with window overhang properties and does not alter walls, HVAC systems, or schedules.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 4StoreyBuilding model has 5 south-facing windows/doors across 3 occupied floors: Ground floor (G.S11.E1), Middle floor (M.S21.E9), and Top floor (T.S31.E17). The target azimuth for south-facing is 180°. The task requires setting Overhang Depth to 3.0 ft and Distance Above Window to 0.5 ft for these specific windows. No other windows should have overhangs added. The agent must use the eQUEST GUI to perform these actions, run the simulation, and save the project.
